productDisplayName: Gini and Jony Girls Purple Top
description: Composition Purple round neck top made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves and embroidered branding on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Use mild detergents Do not tumble dry Do not iron on emebellishments Use warm iron Remove all detatchable accessories before washing or ironing gini and jony's palm tree line have come up with this pretty top for the apple of your eye!
